arts.ttl: Everything we know about Eddie Howe as Newcastle United boss taken into hospital before Man Utd
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe was taken ill in midweek before being admitted to hospital on Friday night as a precaution leading up to Sunday afternoon's clash with Manchester United. Howe was bedridden for a number of days with an illness as Tindall took charge of the customary pre-match press conference duties in midweek.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe Newcastle United return date update with Crystal Palace training plan in place
arts.sum: Eddie Howe is understood to be on the mend after being admitted to hospital on Friday night - but Newcastle United club chiefs say the head coach's wellbeing is of paramount importance as he starts his recovery. But Newcastle top brass feel that they are in safe hands with Tindall, Graeme Jones, Stephen Purchess and Simon Weatherstone all ensuring that top standards are adhered to while Howe is recovering.
